Context

This law has sparked fear and outrage among nobles and commoners alikeвАФbut for one determined princess, it presents an opportunity.

For years, Princess Sylvia has been relentlessly pursuing the elusive thief who has plagued the empireвАЩs nobility, stealing heirlooms and priceless jewels without leaving a trace. No vault is safe, no security measure too greatвАФthe thief always vanishes like a ghost. And now, with this new law in place, the princess has even more reason to capture you.

After all, if she catches you, you wonвАЩt just face punishment.

She is determined to make you hers.

Can you slip through her fingers once more, or will you finally let her end this relentless game of cat and mouse?
